name: Freezer Mix Chow Mein
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip container of frozen mix into hot water just to loosen.
2. In a 2-quart saucepan, heat frozen mix and water until boiling.
3. Reduce heat; cover and simmer, stirring frequently, until the mixture is thawed, about 20 minutes.
4. Mix soy sauce, cornstarch, molasses, and ginger in a separate bowl.
5. Stir the soy sauce mixture into the meat mixture along with Chinese vegetables.
6. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and boils.
7. Boil and stir for an additional minute.
8. Serve over chow mein noodles or hot cooked rice and top with additional soy sauce.
